mission.title: keylime: keylime_webapp don't work after package install
mission.description: keylime_webapp don't work after package install. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current keylime deployment
steps.description:
Verify your keylime version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keylime -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keylime
helm list -n keylime 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working keylime installation.

steps.title: Review keylime configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant keylime configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n keylime -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keylime
kubectl get configmap -n keylime -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keylime
```
`keylime_webapp` fails to start after installation.
Complains about static content missing.

steps.title: Apply the fix for keylime_webapp don't work after package install
steps.description:
any new updates to test? 

I manually changed my `tenant_webapp.py` to workaround the problem described above:

```diff
[root test]# diff ./keylime/keylime/tenant_webapp.py /usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/keylime/tenant_webapp.py
660,661c660,665
<     my_tls_cert = "%s/%s" % (tls_dir, my_cert)
<  
```yaml
[root@fedora-server keylime]# dnf install python3-pyasn1 -y
Last metadata expiration check: 0:53:00 ago on Mon 25 Jan 2021 12:58:38 PM -03.
Package python3-pyasn1-0.4.8-3.fc33.noarch is already installed.
Dependencies resolved.
Nothing to do.
Complete!
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n keylime -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keylime
kubectl get events -n keylime --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "keylime_webapp don't work after package install" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
any new updates to test? 

I manually changed my `tenant_webapp.py` to workaround the problem described above:

```diff
[root test]# diff ./keylime/keylime/tenant_webapp.py /usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/keylime/tenant_webapp.py
660,661c660,665
<     my_tls_cert = "%s/%s" % (tls_dir, my_cert)
<     my_tls_priv_key = "%s/%s" % (tls_dir, my_priv_key)
---

664a669

```

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with keylime installed or the issue environment reproducible.
